content.query:
SELECT 
Division
,EOMONTH(EntryDate) as EntryMonth
,[EverSet]
,count([LeadID]) as LeadCount
 FROM [EDW].[FACT_LEAD]
 where Division = 'SWR'
 group by
 Division
,EOMONTH(EntryDate)
,[EverSet]
order by 
EOMONTH(EntryDate)
,Division
,[EverSet]

select top 10 *
FROM [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER]
 where Division = 'SWR'
